title: macOS Portfolio
description: An interactive macOS-style desktop simulation built as a personal portfolio. Features draggable windows, a dock, menu bar, Spotlight search, and embedded terminal. Inspired by Ankush's ankush.one.

title: Real-Time Chat App
description: A full-featured real-time chat application with WebSocket messaging, user authentication, group chat support, and emoji reactions. Built with React and Express.js.

title: Task Management Dashboard
description: A collaborative task management tool with drag-and-drop functionality, real-time updates, team collaboration, and progress tracking. Includes calendar and timeline views.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with React frontend, Node.js backend, and MongoDB. Features product filtering, cart management, Stripe payment integration, and an admin dashboard.

title: Data Dashboard
description: Interactive analytics dashboard with real-time charts, filterable data tables, and KPI widgets. Fetches live data from a REST API and visualizes it with Chart.js.
